title: University of Southampton Delhi Contact Methods
text: Use this page to get in touch with us, ask a question about studying at University of Southampton Delhi, or visit one of our locations. We are ready to help. Get in touch By online formTap or click to use formBy emailcustomerservice@delhi.southampton.ac.ukBy phoneCall us on +91 12442-88000
summary: The University of Southampton Delhi provides multiple ways to get in touch, including an online form, email at customerservice@delhi.southampton.ac.uk, and phone at +91 12442-88000.

title: University of Southampton Delhi Campus Location
text: Find our locations Our campusThe campus is located on the International Tech Park Gurgaon at the heart of a thriving business and technogy area. Gurgaon campus International Tech Park Gurgaon Near Sec 59, Off Golf Course Ext Road Gurugram (Gurgaon), Haryana 122101 India
summary: The University of Southampton Delhi campus is situated in International Tech Park Gurgaon, a vibrant business and technology hub, specifically near Sector 59, Gurugram, Haryana, India.

title: Visiting UoSD Campus and Meeting Staff FAQs
text: You might also want to know Can I visit the campus in person or book a tour? Our campus is located at International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101. The best way to see campus is to book a pre-planned tour from our events page. How can I meet your team? You can meet us online, and in a selection of major cities in India. You can see when and where, by visiting the Events area of our website. When event tickets are available, you will be able to book a physical event, or to register for an on online session, from the event page. The best way to see campus is to book a pre-planned tour from our events page.
summary: Visitors can book pre-planned campus tours via the events page to see the International Tech Park Gurgaon campus. Opportunities to meet the university team are available online and at physical events in major Indian cities.

title: Student Hostel Commute and Accommodation Booking
text: How can I travel between the student hostel and campus? Perhaps the best way to get to campus in the morning from our student hostel, or back there again at night, is the private shuttle bus. This free service will run at regular intervals every weekday. When can I book a room at the student hostel? You can apply for a room at the student hostel when you have completed your application to study. We expect demand for rooms to be high, but you can express interest in accommodation for free, which which does not commit you to any contract. We will be in touch with those who have shown interest in accommodation to advise on availability and how to book a room.
summary: A free private shuttle bus provides regular weekday transport between the student hostel and campus. Students can apply for hostel rooms after submitting their study application and express interest in accommodation without commitment.
